parameters.home_advantage_evidence: Declared home team for league seasons; stadium country equals home-team country for international tournaments.

parameters.team_pair_normalization: Each side contributes one unit of total pair exposure per match, divided according to exact shared-pitch time.

parameters.stint_integrity_gate: Intervals implying more than 11 active players on either side are excluded and counted per team; valid red-card lineups remain eligible.
parameters.outcome: goal difference per 90 during constant-lineup stints
parameters.design: weighted ridge regression on an extended hypergraph incidence matrix whose rows are retained generalized lineups and whose columns are players
parameters.objective: minutes-weighted squared error over generalized lineups + ridge penalty on player coefficients
parameters.football_adaptation: Retain players, pairs, trios, quartets, and full observed lineups; exhaustive intermediate orders are omitted because an 11-player lineup has 2,047 non-empty subsets.
parameters.validation_baseline: Team-specific additive APM fitted only to full observed lineup rows with the same chronological split and ridge candidates.
